verses.text: For there our captors called for songs, our cruel tormentors asked for mirth. They called for us to sing to them: “Come, sing us one of Zion’s songs!”
But how can we the LORD’s song sing, when we are in a foreign land? If I forget Jerusalem, let my right hand forget its skill!
O let my tongue to my palate cleave if I do no remember you, if I set not Jerusalem above my greatest, highest joy.
